name: @appstrate/quickbooks-online-mcp-server
description: Intuit's official QuickBooks Online MCP server (intuit/quickbooks-online-mcp-server, MIT), bundled to a single ESM file (esbuild) and run as a local stdio subprocess. Reads QUICKBOOKS_* OAuth credentials from its environment (injected by the @appstrate/quickbooks-online-mcp integration) and refreshes its own access token via intuit-oauth. Defaults to READ-ONLY: QUICKBOOKS_DISABLE_WRITE/UPDATE/DELETE are set in mcp_config.env, exposing 69 get/search tools + 11 financial reports. Remove those flags to enable create/update/delete (140 tools).
author: Intuit (server) / Appstrate (packaging)

tools.name: get_customer
